title: User navigates to the modal screen and selects 'UNLOCK FULL ACCESS'
test_steps: Open the ScholarshipApp and navigate to the modal screen. | Click on the 'UNLOCK FULL ACCESS' option in the pop-up window. | Enter the required payment information to unlock full access.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the payment confirmation screen. | The 'UNLOCK FULL ACCESS' option is successfully selected.

title: User navigates to the modal screen and selects 'CONTINUE WITH FREE RESOURCES'
test_steps: Open the ScholarshipApp and navigate to the modal screen. | Click on the 'CONTINUE WITH FREE RESOURCES' option in the pop-up window.
expected_result: The user remains on the modal screen. | The 'CONTINUE WITH FREE RESOURCES' option is successfully selected.

title: User navigates to the modal screen and clicks on the 'JOIN CODE' button
test_steps: Open the ScholarshipApp and navigate to the modal screen. | Click on the 'JOIN CODE' button.
expected_result: The user is prompted to enter a join code. | The 'JOIN CODE' button is successfully clicked.
